types1:Item.types1:Name: ConfidenceLevelHandlerAgent
types1:Item.types1:Description: Subprocess that depending on the ConfidenceLevel value, either sends a response generated by the Query Agent or Summarizer Agent, or searches for similar Jira tickets related to a similar feature mentioned in the email. If no matching tickets are found, it creates a new Jira ticket and sends a follow-up email to the user

process.name: ConfidenceLevelHandlerAgent
process.description: Subprocess that depending on the ConfidenceLevel value, either sends a response generated by the Query Agent or Summarizer Agent, or searches for similar Jira tickets related to a similar feature mentioned in the email. If no matching tickets are found, it creates a new Jira ticket and sends a follow-up email to the user

assignment.title: Reset retries to 0 if call successful

operation.expression:
concat( "Thank you for reaching out to us.", "
", "This message is a response to your Zendesk ticket number: " ,$temp.Tmp_Zendesk_Ticket_Number , " (link: ", $temp.Tmp_Zendesk_Ticket_Link ,")", "
", "We have created a response to your inquiry below.", "
", "Please find your original question and our answer for your reference.", "
", "If you have any further questions, feel free to contact us again. If you do not have any further questions, please mark the ticket as solved", "
", "
", "Your inquiry:", "
","Subject: ", $temp.Tmp_Email_Subject , "
", $temp.Tmp_Email_Body , "
", "
", "Our response:", "
", $temp.Tmp_Summarizer_Agent_Response )

concat( "We have created a response to your inquiry below.", "
", "
", "Our response:", "
", $temp.Tmp_Summarizer_Agent_Response , "
", "
", "If you have any further questions, feel free to contact us again.", "
", "If you do not have any further questions, please mark the ticket as solved." )

<Generate_Content_Request> <contents> <parts> <text>You are an Agent specialized in creating Jira tickets from customer emails, which are provided in the following format: E-Mail Subject: [Subject] E-Mail Body: [Body] You will be invoked only after the LLM assistant failed to provide a direct or precise solution to the customer's request. Your task: Analyze the provided email content and identify what new or improved functionality could help address the customer's issue or request. Based on that, create a Jira ticket formatted exactly as follows: Summary: (a concise and clear headline derived from the email subject or inferred feature request) Description: (a detailed description based on the email body explaining the customer's problem and proposing the feature/enhancement that would help solve or mitigate it) Important: Provide only the "Summary" and "Description" sections in the exact format, without any additional comments or explanation. Convert vague or unclear problem reports into concrete feature requests by hypothesizing what functionality might be missing or insufficient. Assume you cannot provide a direct troubleshooting answer, only create the feature request ticket. Responses should be written in a fully impersonal form. For example, if the user signs the email with their name, the response must still use impersonal language such as "The customer is experiencing frequent sync failures" rather than personal or direct address. Example: If the email body describes recurring issues with insufficient error messages or missing diagnostics, create a feature request to enhance error reporting and diagnostics with actionable insights. The provided query is: E-Mail Subject: {$temp.Tmp_Email_Subject } E-Mail Body: {$temp.Tmp_Email_Body }. </text> </parts> <role>user</role> </contents> <generationConfig> <stopSequences>{$temp.Tmp_Config_Prompt[1]/stopSequences }</stopSequences> <candidateCount>{$temp.Tmp_Config_Prompt[1]/candidateCount }</candidateCount> <maxOutputTokens>{$temp.Tmp_Config_Prompt[1]/maxOutputTokens }</maxOutputTokens> <temperature>{$temp.Tmp_Config_Prompt[1]/temperature }</temperature> <topP>{$temp.Tmp_Config_Prompt[1]/topP }</topP> <topK>{$temp.Tmp_Config_Prompt[1]/topK }</topK> </generationConfig> </Generate_Content_Request>

assignment.title: Reset retries to 0 if call successful

service.title: Call LLM To Get Summary and Description

subflow.title: Query Pinecone To Get Similar Jira Tickets

operation.expression:
let $links_list := string-join( for $obj in $output.Out_Embeddings_Model_PO return string($obj/JiraLink ), '
' )
return concat( "Thank you for reaching out to us.", "
", "
", "During our review, we identified ", count($output.Out_Embeddings_Model_PO), " existing Jira ticket(s) that address similar topics or issues. These may provide useful context or indicate ongoing work in related areas.", "
", "Below is a list of similar tickets, ordered by relevance:", "
", $links_list, "
", "
", "A Zendesk ticket has been created to track your inquiry and is currently marked as *pending*.", "
", "- Zendesk Ticket Number: ", $temp.Tmp_Zendesk_Ticket_Number , " (link: ", $temp.Tmp_Zendesk_Ticket_Link , ")", "
", "
", "If the information provided meets your expectations, please mark the ticket as *solved*.", "
", "If not, feel free to mark it as *open* again and provide additional details or questions.", "
", "
", "Please find your original inquiry below. If you have any further questions, feel free to contact us again.", "
", "
", "Your inquiry:", "
", "Subject: ", $temp.Tmp_Email_Subject , "
", $temp.Tmp_Email_Body , "
", "
", "Kind Regards,", "
", $temp.Tmp_Support_Company_Name )

parameter.name: In_Jira_Ticket_Description
parameter.expression:
concat( "Agent was unable to provide an answer to the question, so the query has been classified as a feature request.", "
", "
", "Feature Request based on customer's query:", "
", $temp.Tmp_Description, "
", "
", "This ticket refers to the original Zendesk ticket: ", $temp.Tmp_Zendesk_Ticket_Link , "
", "
", "Agent's response (attempt):", "
", $temp.Tmp_Summarizer_Agent_Response )

operation.expression:
concat( "Thank you for reaching out to us.", "
","
", "Your query has been forwarded for further investigation and we classified it as a feature request.", "
","
", "Tickets have been created in our tracking systems:", "
", "- Zendesk Ticket Number: ", $temp.Tmp_Zendesk_Ticket_Number , " (link: ", $temp.Tmp_Zendesk_Ticket_Link , ")", "
", "- Jira Ticket Number: ", $output.Out_Jira_Ticket_Number, " (link: ", $output.Out_Jira_Ticket_Link, ")", "
", "
", "The Jira ticket is now under review, and your Zendesk ticket has been marked as solved.", "
", "
", "Please find your original inquiry below. If you have any further questions, feel free to contact us again.", "
", "
", "Your inquiry:", "
", "Subject: ", $temp.Tmp_Email_Subject , "
", $temp.Tmp_Email_Body , "
", "
", "Kind Regards,", "
", $temp.Tmp_Support_Company_Name )

concat( "Your query has been forwarded for further investigation and we classified it as a feature request.", "
","
", "Jira ticket has been created in our tracking systems:", "
", "- Jira Ticket Number: ", $output.Out_Jira_Ticket_Number, " (link: ", $output.Out_Jira_Ticket_Link, ")", "
", "
", "The Jira ticket is now under review, and your Zendesk ticket has been marked as solved.", "
", "
", "If you have any further questions, feel free to contact us again." )

ns1:SampleData.ns1:Name: test 6
ns1:SampleData.ns1:Data: { "In_Email_Address": "tholub@informatica.com", "In_Email_Body": "Hi Informatica Support, We are experiencing a critical problem with our IDMC configuration. Following the most recent data sync, we detected inconsistencies between the source and destination systems. Certain records are either missing or incorrect, which is generating confusion and may result in significant business issues. We have thoroughly reviewed our settings and logs but have not identified the root cause. What we have attempted so far: re-verified mappings, examined logs, and restarted synchronization jobs. This issue is urgent as we depend on reliable data for reporting and strategic decisions. We would appreciate your prompt assistance in resolving this matter.", "In_Email_Subject": "subject sample", "In_Zendesk_Ticket_Number": "5", "In_Confidence_Level": "50", "In_Summarizer_Agent_Response": "response from agent", "In_Assignee_Email": "tholub@informatica.com", "In_Zendesk_Ticket_Link": "https://informatica-56724.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/5", "In_Model_Version": "gemini-2.0-flash-lite" }

ns1:SampleData.ns1:Name: test 7
ns1:SampleData.ns1:Data: { "In_Email_Address": "tholub@informatica.com", "In_Email_Body": "Hi Informatica Support, We are experiencing a critical problem with our IDMC Mappings. They stuck in the source", "In_Email_Subject": "subject sampleeee", "In_Zendesk_Ticket_Number": "5", "In_Confidence_Level": "50", "In_Summarizer_Agent_Response": "response from agent", "In_Assignee_Email": "tholub@informatica.com", "In_Zendesk_Ticket_Link": "https://informatica-56724.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/5", "In_Model_Version": "gemini-2.0-flash-lite" }

ns1:SampleData.ns1:Name: test new 2
ns1:SampleData.ns1:Data: { "In_Email_Address": "tholub@informatica.com", "In_Email_Body": "Hi Informatica Support, We’re running into a major issue with our IDMC setup. After the latest data synchronization, we noticed unexpected discrepancies between the source and target systems. Some records appear missing or incorrect, which is causing confusion and could lead to serious business problems. We’ve double-checked our configurations and logs but can’t figure out why this is happening. What we’ve tried: Verified mappings, checked logs, and reran sync jobs. This is urgent because we rely on accurate data for reporting and decision-making. Please help us get this resolved quickly. Thanks for your support, Adam Smith", "In_Email_Subject": "subject sample", "In_Zendesk_Ticket_Number": "5", "In_Confidence_Level": "50", "In_Summarizer_Agent_Response": "response from agent", "In_Assignee_Email": "tholub@informatica.com", "In_Zendesk_Ticket_Link": "https://informatica-56724.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/5" }

ns1:SampleData.ns1:Name: test10
ns1:SampleData.ns1:Data: { "In_Email_Address": "tholub@informatica.com", "In_Email_Body": "Hi Informatica Support, We’re currently facing a serious issue with our IDMC setup. After the latest data synchronization, we’ve noticed discrepancies between the source and target systems — some records are either missing or contain incorrect values. This inconsistency is causing confusion and poses a risk to our business operations. We’ve already taken several steps to investigate, including validating our mappings, reviewing system logs, and restarting the sync jobs. Despite these efforts, the root cause remains unclear. Given the importance of accurate data for our reporting and strategic planning, we kindly ask for your immediate support in diagnosing and resolving this problem. Thank you in advance for your assistance.", "In_Email_Subject": "subject sample", "In_Zendesk_Ticket_Number": "5", "In_Confidence_Level": "50", "In_Summarizer_Agent_Response": "response from agent", "In_Assignee_Email": "tholub@informatica.com", "In_Zendesk_Ticket_Link": "https://informatica-56724.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/5", "In_Model_Version": "gemini-2.0-flash-lite" }

ns1:SampleData.ns1:Name: test2
ns1:SampleData.ns1:Data: { "In_Intent": "Feedback", "In_Query_Agent_Response": "", "In_Email_Address": "tholub@informatica.com", "In_Email_Body": "Hi Informatica Support,I wanted to share some feedback regarding the error messages in the IDMC platform. While they usually identify that a problem occurred, sometimes the messages are a bit too vague, which makes troubleshooting longer than necessary. Improving the clarity of these messages could help users resolve issues faster.Thanks for your continuous efforts! Best regards, Anna Kowalska", "In_Email_Subject": "Feedback on Sync Job Error Messages", "In_Zendesk_Ticket_Number": "ZENDESK-123" }

ns1:SampleData.ns1:Name: test4
ns1:SampleData.ns1:Data: { "In_Email_Address": "tholub@informatica.com", "In_Email_Body": "Informatica Support,We’ve been dealing with repeated sync failures in IDMC, and frankly, this is becoming unacceptable. Every time we schedule a data sync, something breaks—records fail to update or the jobs just stall with no clear error messages. We’ve wasted a lot of time trying to troubleshoot on our own, only to see the same problems again and again.We expect a prompt and thorough investigation because these ongoing issues are severely impacting our business operations. Please provide a solution immediately instead of generic responses.Awaiting your urgent response, James Wilson", "In_Email_Subject": "Continuous IDMC Sync Failures", "In_Zendesk_Ticket_Number": "5", "In_Confidence_Level": "40", "In_Summarizer_Agent_Response": "abc", "In_Assignee_Email": "g@wp.pl", "In_Zendesk_Ticket_Link": "https://informatica-56724.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/5" }
